role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Analyzed the street sign 'Ricoutsvoert' and its suffix '-voert' as a Dutch toponymic feature.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Evaluated terrain flatness, paving patterns, and architectural styles typical of the Low Countries.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Assessed dormant deciduous trees and manicured hedges as indicators of a temperate maritime climate.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Identified the street name sign format and grey brick paving (klinkers) as regulatory/infrastructure markers.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (lamp design, license plates, architecture) to distinguish between Benelux countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Netherlands. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (specifically the street sign and paving), and the tournament effectively used this evidence to distinguish the Netherlands from its closest lookalike, Belgium.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the visible street sign text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the flat terrain and brick paving.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly noted the dormant state of the trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified the grey brick paving and sign style.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the lamp design and license plate colors.
